vision_profile.current_state: Tanvi is an experienced Technical Program Manager with 9 years of experience, skilled in program management, stakeholder communication, and risk management. She currently earns 185,000 INR monthly.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her primary blocker is a perceived lack of deep technical fluency in platform architecture, which prevents her from being a trusted voice in early-stage technical planning and limits her career progression to senior platform leadership.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Tanvi aims to confidently lead complex platform programs, actively contributing to technical architecture decisions, mastering roadmap prioritization, and effectively managing engineering dependencies, ultimately securing a Platform Program Lead role with a target salary of 280,000 INR monthly.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is driven by the desire to be a respected and trusted leader in technical planning rooms, moving beyond merely executing decisions made by others, and to overcome the fear of her career plateauing due to insufficient technical depth.

milestones.identity_statement: Build a robust understanding of core platform engineering principles to confidently engage in technical discussions.
